title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Ritz Beds Ltd
body: "Application number 5458  Applicant The Ritz (Hotel London) Limited objected to the name used by Ritz Beds Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 24 November 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Ritz Beds Ltd is changed to 16102016 Ltd. "
